holdings.infoBox: IMTM is an equity ETF with a total of 325 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 5.83%, Kioxia Holdings at 2.62%, HSBC Holdings at 2.60%, Royal Bank of Canada at 2.29%, and The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 1.85%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Intl Momentum Factor ETF (IMTM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI ex USA Momentum index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap stocks from developed countries, ex-US. The momentum-selected stocks are weighted by market cap and momentum. IMTM was launched on Jan 13, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
